ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Informational Materials, Exhibit AB) */,
  "short_form_name" TEXT /* Short form name of the document, if applicable */,
  "registrant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registrant */,
  "foreign_principal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the foreign principal */,
  "date_stamped" TEXT /* Date the document was stamped */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the document */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_foreign_principal_id FOREIGN KEY ("foreign_principal_id") REFERENCES foreign_principals ("principal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_registrant_id FOREIGN KEY ("registrant_id") REFERENCES registrants ("registrant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrants" (
  "registrant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registrant */,
  "registrant_name" TEXT /* Name of the registrant */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the registrant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the registrant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the registrant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the registrant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the registrant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the registrant was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the registrant */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the registrant was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registrant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foreign_principals" (
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foreign principal */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the foreign principal */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the foreign principal */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the foreign principal */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the foreign principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the foreign principal */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the foreign principal */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the foreign principal was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the foreign principal */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the foreign principal was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compliance officer, attorney, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the document version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity that was changed (e.g., document, user) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change that was made (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id")
)
